positive: A high-quality image of a futuristic cityscape at dusk with neon lights and towering skyscrapers, shot from above in a 3/4 view, with a gradient of blues and purples to evoke a sense of wonder and enchantment.
negative: A blurry, low-resolution photo of a cat looking directly at the camera with an awkward expression, overlaid with a poorly placed filter that makes it look like the image was taken with a smartphone.
